width_over_tires_in = 48.5 in (standard 11.8 in / 300mm tracks). OEM lists 'Overall Width w/Std Bucket = 48.5 in' and 'Track Width = 11.8 in'.

emissions_tier = Tier 4 Final â€” DOC-equipped engine per OEM brochure. Standard T4F classification.
